TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Alexander Van der Bellen == ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 1, Alexander Van der Bellen, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Austria ta' misuw hya' ga Alexander Van der Bellen, aring ryax tay 26 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Alexander Van der Bellen maki tay kawas 1962 msqun ki Sandra Davenport, maki tay kawas 2015 t'alax. pinqbaqan nya Alexander Van der Bellen, kawas tay 1966 malax mqwas biru sa Innsbruck pqwsan biru krahu . mintzyuwaw nya Alexander Van der Bellen sa kawas 1994, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == alexan*er *an *er βellen == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, alexan*er *an *er βellen, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw aus~ɕtria taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa alexan*er *an *er βellen, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja alexan*er *an *er βellen maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki s~ɕan*ra *a*enport, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. pinqβaqan nja alexan*er *an *er βellen, kawas~ɕ taj **** malax mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa inns~ɕβruʦ~ʨk pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu . mintzjuwaw nja alexan*er *an *er βellen s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: == Alexander Van der Bellen == ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 1, Alexander Van der Bellen, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Austria ta' misuw hya' ga Alexander Van der Bellen, aring ryax tay 26 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Alexander Van der Bellen maki tay kawas 1962 msqun ki Sandra Davenport, maki tay kawas 2015 t'alax. pinqbaqan nya Alexander Van der Bellen, kawas tay 1966 malax mqwas biru sa Innsbruck pqwsan biru krahu . mintzyuwaw nya Alexander Van der Bellen sa kawas 1994, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == alexan*er *an *er βellen == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, alexan*er *an *er βellen, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw aus~ɕtria taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa alexan*er *an *er βellen, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja alexan*er *an *er βellen maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki s~ɕan*ra *a*enport, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. pinqβaqan nja alexan*er *an *er βellen, kawas~ɕ taj **** malax mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa inns~ɕβruʦ~ʨk pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu . mintzjuwaw nja alexan*er *an *er βellen s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
